headline: Want early access?
subheadline: We're opening diBoaS to a small group first. Join the waitlist to be among the first to get access.
subheader: We're opening diBoaS to a small group first. Join the waitlist to be among the first to get access.

form.privacyNote: We'll never spam you. Just updates on when you can get started.

error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
error.consentRequired: Please check the box to continue.
error.network: Connection error. Please check your internet and try again.

confirmation.headline: Welcome to the movement.
confirmation.shareBenefit: Share to help friends get early access
confirmation.shareExplanation: The sooner we launch, the sooner this becomes real.

explanation.foundingMember: You're among the first 1,200. Share your link — you have 5 invites to give friends Founding Member status.
explanation.earlyMember: Invited by a Founding Member. Share your link to help friends get early access.
explanation.priorityWaitlist: You're on the priority waitlist. Share your link to move up and help friends join.

stats.foundingMembersFull: All founding member spots claimed — join the early access waitlist

referral.keepSharing: Keep sharing to help friends get early access!

returningUser.keepSharing: Keep sharing to help friends get early access!

deletion.confirmBody: Click the button below to permanently delete all your data from the diBoaS waitlist. This action cannot be undone.
deletion.successBody: All your personal data has been permanently removed from our system.
deletion.expiredBody: This deletion link has expired. Please submit a new deletion request.
deletion.errorBody: We couldn't process your request. Please try again or contact support.
